titleStmt.title: SII 20.355: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 355. (B.K. No. 80 of 1935-36.) KALKĒRI, HANGAL TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This record which is engraved below No. 196, in characters of about the 13th-14th Century A.D., is dated in the cyclic year Sarvadhāri, Māghā, ba. 30, Saturday, Solar eclipse. The details cannot be verified.
The inscription records a gift, at the instance of Pradhāna Bākenāyaka, of certain toll income by Immadi Siṅganāyaka-Voḍeya, Dēmarasa and Tipparasa, for the benefit of the Sōmanātha temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
sarvvadhāri saṁvacarada māgha ba 30 śa lu sū
riyyagrahaṇa pu(ṁ)ṇyakāladalū mā
dana yiṁmaḍi siṁgenāyakavoḍeyara A
yivaru komārara gaṁḍa dēvarsavoḍe
yaru A pradhāna bākenāyakara nirū
padiṁ kalikeṟeya Adhikāri śulka yajuRead śukla.
śākheya visaṁṇagaḷa suputra tipparsarū śrī
sōmanāthadēvara pūjākārigaḷiki biṭṭa dīpakeRead gaḷige.
māṁnya yettu mūru bhaṁḍi vaṁdu ma maṁjadaka kaṟuya
meṇasina hēṟumaṁ māṇikava taṁdare Ayidu pa mā
nya yi da(ṁ)mmavanārobarū Aḷupade naḍasidarige kulakō
ṣṭiyanudharidanu Aḷupidava vāraṇāsi kurukṣētraRead ṭiyanuddaripanu.
dalu sahasrakavileya koṁda pāpake hōha ggōvede
ya māḍida pāpake (pāpake) hōha Aseti braṁhmeti
da pāpake hōha Aḷupidavana vaṁsa nirvvaṁusa
mādōja Avana maga cauḍōja Avana maga sidōja
Avana maga sōmōjana maga kallappa barada sāsana
Digital edition of SII 20.355 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
